comical.def: 滑稽的、好笑的人的人物
comical.ex: His comical expression made the baby laugh aloud.

comically.ex: The plan failed comically, making everyone laugh.

comics.def: 連環畫、漫畫的人物 (複數)
comics.ex: He loves reading comics on a sunny Sunday morning.

coming.def: 來到、即將到來的人 (或物)
coming.col: coming soon, up and coming (有前途)
coming.ex: The new movie is coming soon to local theaters.

comity.ex: The comity of nations is essential for global peace.

comma.ex: Remember to put a comma after the first word tonight.

command.def: 命令、指揮、掌握、博得的人的人的人物
command.col: take command, at one's command, royal command
command.ex: The general is in command of the entire local army.

commandant.def: 司令官、指揮官的人物 (單數)
commandant.ex: The camp commandant gave some new strict orders.

commander.def: 指揮官、海軍中校人物 (單數)
commander.ex: The supreme commander arrived at the base today.

commanding.ex: The hotel has a commanding view of the local bay.

commandment.ex: The ten commandments are central to their faith.

commando.def: 突擊隊、突擊隊員人物 (單數)
commando.ex: The elite commando unit was sent on a mission.

commemorate.ex: The statue was built to commemorate the great king.

commemoration.def: 紀念、紀念儀式的人物 (單數)
commemoration.ex: A special service was held in commemoration of him.

commemorative.ex: The post office issued a new commemorative stamp.

commence.ex: Work will commence on the new bridge next week.

commencement.def: 開始、畢業學位頒授典禮人物 (單數)
commencement.ex: The commencement speech was truly inspiring today.

commend.def: 稱讚、推薦、委託的人的人
commend.ex: I would like to commend you for your hard work.

commendable.def: 值得讚揚的、可推薦地 (讚)
commendable.ex: You have made a very commendable effort tonight.

commendably.ex: The young students behaved commendably tonight.

commendation.ex: He received an official commendation for bravery.

commensurate.def: 相稱的、同量的的人的人物
commensurate.ex: Salary should be commensurate with experience.

comment.def: 評論、註解、發表評論的人的人人物 (單數)
comment.col: no comment, fair comment, comment on
comment.ex: The manager refused to comment on the new rumors.

commentary.def: 評論、解說、實況報導的人物 (單數)
commentary.ex: The sports commentary was very exciting tonight.

commentate.def: 做實況報導、評論的人的人
commentate.ex: He was hired to commentate on the football match.

commentator.def: 時事評論家、解說員的人物 (單數)
commentator.ex: The famous news commentator interviewed the leader.
